user.title: Connect to Lunatone DALI-2 IoT
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Lunatone DALI-2 IoT interface.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Lunatone device. Please check the IP address and port.

abort.already_configured: This Lunatone device is already configured.

init.title: Lunatone DALI-2 IoT Options
init.description: Configure device scanning and polling behavior.

data.scan_new_devices_on_startup: Scan for new devices on startup

data_description.background_status_polling: Automatically poll device states in the background. Device state changes from physical buttons are detected in real-time via WebSocket regardless of this setting.
data_description.polling_interval: How often to poll device states when background polling is enabled (300-86400 seconds, default 1800 = 30 minutes). Only applies if background polling is enabled.
data_description.scan_new_devices_on_startup: Automatically scan for new, changed, or removed devices when Home Assistant starts. Use the Manual Scan button to discover devices on demand.
